---
title: Monitoring Air Quality in Town
date: 2022-02-05T06:38:25-05:00
draft: true
layout: single
show_thumbnail: true
excerpt: Purple air widgets show the air quality in the area near my home.
---

## Purle Air Monitor Widgets

[Purple Air Map](https://map.purpleair.com/1/mAQI/a10/p604800/cC0#10.65/43.6131/-84.1613)

<html>
<style> .wrapper { display: flex; } </style>
<div class="wrapper",style="width: 100%">
<div id='PurpleAirWidget_128747_module_AQI_conversion_C0_average_10_layer_standard'>
Loading
PurpleAir Widget...
<script
src='https://www.purpleair.com/pa.widget.js?key=G6D5YRH2KAH9RC9A&module=AQI&conversion=C0&average=10&layer=standard&container=PurpleAirWidget_128747_module_AQI_conversion_C0_average_10_layer_standard'></script>
</div>
<div id='PurpleAirWidget_37741_module_AQI_conversion_C0_average_10_layer_standard'>
Loading
PurpleAir Widget...</div>
<script
src='https://www.purpleair.com/pa.widget.js?key=MY9PMHUHU9TQV7OK&module=AQI&conversion=C0&average=10&layer=standard&container=PurpleAirWidget_37741_module_AQI_conversion_C0_average_10_layer_standard'></script>
</div>
</html>
